metadata.description: Composite leg model linking tibial shaft, fibula, blood supply, and compartment layout.

Deep infection risk especially with open tibial shaft fractures.

decisionPoints.trigger: Closed injury with acceptable alignment in patient suitable for casting/bracing
decisionPoints.action: Nonoperative immobilization with serial compartment exams and repeat radiographs

decisionPoints.trigger: Unstable alignment, open injury, segmental/comminuted pattern, or unacceptable deformity
decisionPoints.action: Proceed with operative stabilization pathway (typically IM nail when soft tissues allow) with documented compartment exam
